description: A designed share-card built from a screenshot of a Breitbart News article. The top bears a large bold black all-caps headline 'JD VANCE: NATIVE-BORN CITIZENS ARE DRIVING GROWTH — ‘JOBS ARE GOING TO AMERICAN WORKERS FOR A CHANGE’'. Beneath the headline is Breitbart's row of social-share buttons: a blue Facebook button showing '64', a black 'X / TWEET' button, a gray 'EMAIL' button, and a blue 'TRUTH' (Truth Social) button. Below that, framed by Breitbart's signature thick orange border, is a video still: Vice President JD Vance (dark suit, white shirt, red tie, bearded) seated and speaking at an event, an American flag to his left and faded 'BREITBART' branding behind him; a white play-button triangle overlays the center and a white Breitbart 'B' logo sits in the upper right. Superimposed across the bottom of the still in huge bold white block letters with a drop shadow is the phrase 'AMERICAN JOBS!'. The graphic borrows a partisan outlet's headline plus added meme-style caption text to push the message that employment gains are flowing to native-born/American workers rather than immigrants. Target audience: supporters receptive to an 'America First' jobs-and-immigration framing.
notable_text: JD VANCE: NATIVE-BORN CITIZENS ARE DRIVING GROWTH — 'JOBS ARE GOING TO AMERICAN WORKERS FOR A CHANGE'; AMERICAN JOBS!
